hooks.command: p=$(printf '%s' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_USE_INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); case "$p" in *backend/alembic/versions/*.py) echo 'Edit blocked: alembic/versions/*.py is regenerated via `uv run alembic revision --autogenerate` — never hand-edited (and ruff is excluded from this directory). Run a fresh autogen instead.' >&2; exit 2 ;; *.env|*.env.local|*.env.*.local) echo 'Edit blocked: secrets file. Edit it manually outside Claude, or update .env.example for documentation.' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac

p=$(printf '%s' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_USE_INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); case "$p" in *backend/*.py) [ -f "$p" ] && (cd backend && uv run --quiet ruff format "${p#*backend/}" >/dev/null 2>&1 && uv run --quiet ruff check --fix --quiet "${p#*backend/}" >/dev/null 2>&1) ;; esac
